heading: Hi, I'm Brynn
bio1: I started doing permanent makeup because I believed every woman deserves to feel put-together without the effort. Over 15 years later, that belief hasn't changed. My technique has gotten a whole lot better.
bio2: I work out of two studios: Boulder, Colorado and Ormond Beach, Florida. Wherever you are, I'd love to sit down, talk through what you're looking for, and create something you'll wake up happy with every single day.
credentials: Member, Society of Permanent Cosmetic Professionals
